rules.title: Potential IDOR: route user identifier is used without an authorization guard
rules.description: Flags controller code that accepts a user identifier from a path parameter and uses it to fetch user-owned resources without an obvious ownership or admin check.

rules.title: Potential weak JWT validation or too-short key
rules.description: Flags JJWT usage when Jwts.parser() is used without require-constraints or when a literal HMAC key shorter than 32 bytes is used.
